reasoning: The report describes severe packet loss and throughput degradation at the O-DU network interface, which affects multiple interfaces (E2, F1-c, F1-u) that terminate at the O-DU. The convergence of failures on these interfaces indicates that the failure originates at the O-DU, and the A1 interface anomalies are symptomatic of this primary failure. The failure chain leads to a network-wide performance collapse.
actionable_steps: 1. Perform a hardware health check on the O-DU network interface cards (NICs) and physical cabling. 2. Inspect the O-DU resource utilization to ensure the failure is not due to a CPU/Memory exhaustion causing packet the drops. 3. Restart the O-DU communication stack to clear potential hung processes in the F1 and E2 interface handlers.
